Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantpapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shawn Miller, Esq. for Petitioner: Bouchra Simmons, present as Guardian ad litem for Satine Cumming n a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,875.00
Costs $1,500.00 as hold back on medi-cal lien.
A net balance of $4,125.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Van Ness & Market, San Francisco, CA. 94103, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
Matter is added to the calendar of Oct. 14, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for status of the deposit into a blocked account. No appearance is necessary if receipt of the deposit was filed.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, Plaintiff Bouchra Simmons and Satine Cumming's motion to quash deposition subpoenas for business records, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
